samples:
I hope you know my name
I want to be the one who takes you all away
Please tell me where we're at
It sure does look like a dump to me


You can have the diamonds and the gold
All of that is mine alone
You can have this mansion on the hill
With its golden throne


I need your sweet devotion
Let's make love again tonight
This will be our last goodbye


So take the diamond from my crown
Or leave it here and let us drown
We both know this isn't right
And so, I ask for permission
To remove myself from your sight
Don't try to reason with me
Just give me your blessing


Come alive into the light
Open up your eyes and see
That everything is fine
There are those whom you tried to be
But they've failed miserably
The earth has cracked and opened up
And swallowed down all their plans
Their souls now ride the storm
Leaving devastation behind

The first time i saw her
I didn't know what to say
She was sitting in a clearing
With a smile on her face
There was magic surrounding her
Auras were coming off of her
And she had the sweetest grace


It seemed like she knew everything
As though it was all planned out
She could move through space and time
Without disturbing sounds
She wore her hair around her neck
Like she was wearing a necklace
And she held my heart in her mouth


Then I heard her scream loud, "Run!"
Her voice echoed through the trees
We ran for our lives
Leaving her behind


All that remains is her ring
Shattered into pieces
Holding by my middle finger
To show them how to behave




Inhale deeply as you wish to return
Take another sip from your glass
Bask in beauty while it surrounds you
Forever stay rooted in place




When we run fast enough
Death comes running after us
The light at the end of the tunnel fades away

A deep breath
Into the sea
Cleansing my soul
Ready to dive in again


All I've seen
Seeming to grow faster than time ever can


I hear voices calling
Bringing me down to reason
I wonder why, how long till we can fly?


It makes you sad
And it makes us all feel small again
The circle is empty
Leave your mark on this rock and soil


You are a dream come true
Another chance at happiness found anew
We bring our hearts away with us
With open eyes, they always knew




Burning man
Standing above as smoke clears the sky
Flashing lights
Guiding stars lead the way through the night
Burning man
Waiting patiently while ash settles slow
Reflections
Watching them fade into ether below



Come on in
Let's not be afraid of what's inside our heads
We can start now
To cleanse your past before stepping in red


Burning man
Standing above as smoke clears the sky
Flashing lights
Guiding stars lead the way through the night
Burning man
Waiting patiently while ash settles slowly
Reflections
Watching them fade into ether below

(Oh, oh)
I don't think there will ever come a time when I lose you
You're always on my mind and in my heart's embrace


It's so easy to run through these open valleys
But who am I trying to escape?


As the wind is blowing
Tear me limb from limb
Leaving nothing but debris
I wish it was all just a dream
And then we could start again

Falling asleep in abandoned places
Surrounding by death-filled breath


The path that we have chosen is winding and dangerous
All that I require is for you to stay with me now
There is no sign of weakness or fearfulness
We are here to conquer this mountain top




As the wind is blowing
Tear me limb from limb
Leaving nothing but debris
I wish it was all just a dream
And then we could start again

Holding you close
Never let you go
Be mine for life
I will never stop

Guide your soul
Hold it tight


The light shines bright
Bring us closer to the sun
Fire in the eye of man
Shines a golden ring around his brow
All that glitters isn't gold
Burn the land and kill the sheep


It hurts my heart to see you cry
It's killing me inside
You didn't have to run away


Guide your soul
Hold it tight
Light shines bright
Bring us closer to the sun




Fire burns deep within the skull
I close my eyes and listen loud
And I hear voices telling me how
To get out alive
Death will come for all mankind
We don't have time to lose
Don't wait up on the sidelines


It hurts my heart to see you cry
It's killing me inside
You didn't have to run away

Guide your soul
Hold it tight
Light shines bright
Bring us closer to the sun


There goes the last nail in my coffin, they said

This is the end of a chapter
I hope that you understand
It's too late to escape now
Just stay here and take my hand


Now, I'm standing in an open field
Looking up at the clouds
And all that I can tell myself
Is how this makes me so damn proud

I have walked through fire
Burned inside out
Burning every part of me
All this pain is so damn beautiful

There was no sound as we descended
We had reached our final goal
The moment landed and it burst us into flame
Leaving behind a memory that will never fade away

Look where we are now
Head hanging low
Will we ever learn from our mistakes?
You know these thoughts drive me crazy
Taking over all I say

But all that I need to do
Is lay this burden down
To watch you lead the way

There was no sound as we descended
We had reached our final goal
The moment landed and it burst us into flame
Leaving behind a memory that will never fade away

Take a deep breath
Watch the stars fall down on you
Basking in all your glory
The beauty of the sea
It's no surprise


You can have it all
A love that never dies
I want to see what's next for us
It's not too late to run


Look ahead to where we stand
Standing on solid ground
Our hearts are bursting from our chests
Into this raging storm
The light will shine for us

You can have it all
A love that never dies
I want to see what's next for us
It's not too late to run


We sing louder than we ever have before
With every ounce of strength I have within my control
I'm gonna fight until the bitter end
Fight till they put me underground
We sing louder than we ever have before


We sing louder than we ever have before
With every ounce of strength I have within my control
I'm gonna fight until the bitter end
Fight till they put me underground
We sing louder than we ever have before

You and I
We're underground again
Into the black hole of despair


We are coming up through the cracks in time
A new life, a brand new kind


Come with me now
To the other side
The light will show you where to find us all


Dig deep into the ground below
Finding pieces of my soul
It makes me wonder what has ever come before
And how to follow


We have reached bottom
Sucking on bone
Death surrounds us but there is still breath left to breathe


Bring us all back home
Lay us down in dirt
I need some more time to rest my head
This ancient past is covered in blood and rust
But it shines like gold


We have reached bottom
Sucking on bone
Death surrounds us but there is still breath left to breathe
Bring us all back home
Lay us down in dirt
I need some more time to rest my head
This ancient past is covered in blood and rust
But it shines like gold

To see the face of death
Aching deep within my skull
An ocean turns to dust
The earth will crack and swallow all


And when I was your age
I would run through valleys made with blood
And laugh at the sky above
It filled me with a rage


Burning faster than a match can burn
All I know is that it hurts so bad
Just like walking barefoot on broken glass
There's no way to tell where we are now


You come calling from the blackout side
Bring relief, bring light
Then you turn around and disappear
Leaving me alone in the dark tonight


This could be our last goodbye
Please take into consideration what I have said
For this I shall not go
Without being freed


Burning faster than a match can burn
All I know is that it hurts so bad
Just like walking barefoot on broken glass
There's no way to tell where we are now

You come calling from the black out side
Bring relief, bring light
Then you turn around and disappear
Leaving me alone in the dark tonight

There's a crack in the door, there's blood on my hands
I killed some time for myself just to plan this raid
We broke all the glass, we tore it down
And now you're trapped inside of our lair

I feel no remorse for the victim or circumstance
We came here today with our hearts in our eyes
I hear you scream loud but I can't see your face
You cannot escape from these mountains of clay
And when they come calling, will you answer?

The forest is burning and all that remain
Are stumps covered in ash and dirt
I have seen your face before, yet I can't remember where
It may be tomorrow, but there's ash in my teeth


Through the cracks in the wall, I spy faces familiar
They haunt me by day, haunt me by night
I keep walking faster as they fall behind
The price of failure is high, never mind
Let's just say it was worth while

The forest is burning and all that remain
Are stumps covered in ash and dirt
I have seen your face before, yet I can't remember where
It may be tomorrow, but there's ash in my teeth
